section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

content.p: For the purpose of carrying out this part, there are authorized to be appropriated $8,000,000 for fiscal year 1991, and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1992 and 1993.

section.sourceCredit: (July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title III, § 378, as added Pub. L. 101–616, title II, § 206(a), Nov. 16, 1990, 104 Stat. 3285; amended Pub. L. 105–196, § 4(1), July 16, 1998, 112 Stat. 636.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1998—Pub. L. 105–196 made technical amendment relating to placement of section within part H of this subchapter.
